capabilities.decisionReason: Keep proven normalization and provider-failure behavior, but rebuild identity and point-in-time lineage inside V2.
capabilities.deleteGate: V2 adapters pass pagination, gap, duplicate, reconnect, 429 and schema-drift tests and all Legacy consumers are zero.

capabilities.decisionReason: Rotation and quotas are references only; venue-aware identity and accounting must be new authority.
capabilities.deleteGate: 100% observed accounting, canonical identity reconciliation and replacement scan scheduling pass Shadow.

capabilities.decisionReason: Retain as a comparison baseline until V2 detector replay exists; no logic enters M0 or M1.
capabilities.deleteGate: V2 Detector replay and real-time no-write Shadow meet approved recall, precision, lead-time and queue criteria.

capabilities.decisionReason: Failure classes are useful, while plans, limits, rights and endpoint lineage require a new registry.
capabilities.deleteGate: All enabled V2 endpoints have fresh docs review, live probe, schema fingerprint, license and fallback contract.

capabilities.decisionReason: Preserve deterministic regime examples only after binding every input to one feature cutoff.
capabilities.deleteGate: V2 MarketContext is point-in-time replayable and all detector-specific regime copies are gone.

capabilities.decisionReason: Indicators and structure helpers require individual point-in-time review; no generation is inherited wholesale.
capabilities.deleteGate: Per-function extraction registry complete and the single family pipeline passes holdout/Shadow.

capabilities.decisionReason: Retain anti-false-READY cases and complete-plan checks, not the parallel Legacy authority.
capabilities.deleteGate: Only one V2 writer can produce ActionState and legacy decision consumers are zero.

capabilities.decisionReason: Reuse proven transaction, idempotency and outbox patterns behind new V2 episode semantics.
capabilities.deleteGate: V2 Episode schema and migration pass rehearsal, lineage, reconciliation, Shadow and authority cutover.

capabilities.decisionReason: Parallel lifecycle semantics cannot enter V2.
capabilities.deleteGate: Consumer scan proves no route, worker or review path reads this lifecycle.

capabilities.decisionReason: Repository patterns are reference material, but every V2 authority must reject missing durable storage.
capabilities.deleteGate: Per-schema roles, outbox, unavailable behavior, backup and restore tests pass and no V2 authority can fall back to memory.

capabilities.decisionReason: Compatibility cases inform dual-read validation; no composition or decision call is extracted.
capabilities.deleteGate: All pages consume one DecisionSnapshot and contract/dual-read diff is approved.

capabilities.decisionReason: Current pages are observation material only until DecisionSnapshot is authoritative.
capabilities.deleteGate: V2 E2E, accessibility, visual and performance gates pass after read-authority cutover.

capabilities.decisionReason: Dedupe and cooldown behavior is reusable after alerts are driven only by immutable snapshots.
capabilities.deleteGate: Duplicate/stale READY alert count is zero and delivery receipts are authoritative.

capabilities.decisionReason: Outcome, research, user journal and production state require separate writers and datasets.
capabilities.deleteGate: Frozen Outcome datasets, research registry, no-future-leak tests and promotion separation pass.

capabilities.decisionReason: Retain future-leak and Golden defenses while adding V2 event-label comparability.
capabilities.deleteGate: Not planned; retain as evidence until V2 replacements exceed retention requirements.

capabilities.decisionReason: Retain private-session defenses until V2 default-deny API and role isolation pass.
capabilities.deleteGate: ASVS matrix, default-deny API and session rotation/logout tests pass.

capabilities.decisionReason: Heartbeat patterns remain useful, but liveness, dependency, business, freshness and release truth must split.
capabilities.deleteGate: Four health classes and end-to-end trace identities are the sole production contract.

capabilities.decisionReason: Preserve bounded mutation and rollback discipline while retiring cycle-specific packets only after consumer zero.
capabilities.deleteGate: Generic runner covers all active release types and historical packets have no runtime consumer.

capabilities.decisionReason: No source is promoted until license, manipulation resistance and incremental value are proven.
capabilities.deleteGate: Independent ADR either promotes a licensed context source or retires the code.

capabilities.decisionReason: Risk arithmetic and unknown-leverage behavior are reusable only as views that cannot upgrade ActionState.
capabilities.deleteGate: V2 risk views cannot upgrade ActionState and portfolio concentration tests pass.

capabilities.decisionReason: Status language and anti-misleading checks can be rebuilt against only DecisionSnapshot.
capabilities.deleteGate: Adapters cannot create direction, score, freshness or plan fields and all pages use the V2 snapshot.

capabilities.decisionReason: Mixed ownership forbids blanket inheritance; review only when an owning V2 package needs a pattern.
capabilities.deleteGate: Each consumer is classified during its owning V2 package.
